name: Wamego City Park
description: Wamego City Park is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Wamego, KS. There are 6 outdoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. Players have access to restrooms and water. The courts are free.

name: Wamego City Pickleball Courts
description: Wamego City Pickleball Courts is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Wamego, KS. There are 6 outdoor concrete courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. You can’t reserve the courts. The facility includes amenities like lights. The courts are free.
